ogTitle: Carrum vs Carrum Downs: Climate Safety

heading: Carrum vs Carrum Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Carrum, Victoria and Carrum Downs, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Carrum Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Carrum (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Carrum or Carrum Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Carrum has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Carrum Downs scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Carrum scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Carrum Downs scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Carrum or Carrum Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Carrum Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
